name: What Your Pizza Says About You
recipeInstructions: The Domino's company conducts surveys or claims to do so when they are not busy delivering pizzas. Men wearing muscle shirts order pepperoni three times more often than any other topping when ordering. People with pierced noses, lips, or eyebrows request a vegetarian topping 23% more frequently than meat toppings. Those living in homes with wind chimes on the porch are four times more likely to choose olives. Pizza consumption is closely tied to TV-watching; "Roseanne" airing generates the highest pizza orders during its time slot. The most popular show for vegetable-topped pizzas is "Melrose Place," which has seen a 14% increase in orders since Heather Locklear joined the cast. Since Republicans won the election, meat-topped pizza orders have risen by 32% in the Washington metropolitan area. Tipping patterns also changed: women's tipping to Democratic offices increased by 4%, while it decreased for Republican offices by 2%. Newt Gingrich's appearances on national TV boost pizza orders to Democratic offices and reduce them at Republican ones. The peak hour for pizza delivery historically was when O.J. Simpson was in the white Ford Bronco on L.A. freeways.
